name: Amoxicillin
description: Kwayoyin rigakafi mai fadi-bakan aminopenicillin. Kwayoyin rigakafi na baka don kamuwa da rauni. Wani ɓangare na fakitin kwaya na TCCC don rigakafin rauni a cikin raunin da ba shi da ƙarfi.
indications: Rauni kamuwa da cuta (matsakaicin raunuka, fakitin kwaya na baka)
dose: 500 MG PO kowane sa'o'i 8 x 7 kwanaki (rauni prophylaxis). 875 MG PO kowane 12 hours madadin.
window: Fara a cikin sa'o'i 3 na rauni don rigakafin rauni.
contraindications: Sanin rashin lafiyar penicillin (amfani da doxycycline maimakon)
warnings: Idan rashin lafiyar penicillin: maye gurbin doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Hanyar baka kawai -- yi amfani da maganin rigakafi na IV (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) don raunuka masu tsanani ko kuma idan ba a yarda da baki ba.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg/kg/rana raba q8h (max 500 mg/dose). Yi amfani da tunani na tushen nauyi na Broselow.

obstetric.note: Amintacce a cikin ciki. An fi so fiye da doxycycline (wanda aka hana a ciki).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
